series_metadata.series_description: Contains permanent inventory of state canal lands real estate as well as records of sales, transfers, acquisitions, easements, environmental covenants, leases, licenses, lease management agreements, lease assignments, departmental transfers, and other long-term transactions involving canal lands. Series may include, without limitation, deeds, deed books, lease folders, property descriptions, survey plats and maps, field notes, photographs, appraisals and valuations, title examinations, journal entries, Attorney General Opinions, work requests, invoicing, and correspondence. Records may be maintained in several formats including databases, microform, spreadsheets, paper files, or image and data files.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Permanent. If paper copy is scanned and saved in an electronic format or micro-form, paper copy may be destroyed at that time. Review by State Archives before disposal ; Electronic: Permanent
